summary: Completed testing of in-app notification system. Backend APIs (4 endpoints) all working. Frontend NotificationBell component renders correctly with unread count badge and dropdown. Fixed bug in notifications route where created_at string was incorrectly calling .isoformat().
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend routes/notifications.py - All 4 notification endpoints working
✅ GET /api/notifications/user/{user_id} - Returns notifications array with unread_count
✅ POST /api/notifications/mark-read/{notification_id} - Marks single notification as read
✅ POST /api/notifications/mark-all-read/{user_id} - Marks all notifications as read
✅ Frontend NotificationBell.js - Renders bell icon in dashboard header
✅ Bell shows red badge with unread count (39 in test)
✅ Dropdown opens on click showing notification list
✅ Notifications display correct icons based on type (payment_approved, referral_joined, prc_credited)
✅ 'Mark all read' button visible and functional
FIXED: routes/notifications.py line 137-139 - Fixed bug where created_at string was incorrectly calling .isoformat()
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test notifications (payment_approved, referral_joined, prc_credited) for user 73b95483-f36b-4637-a5ee-d447300c6835
context_for_next_testing_agent: In-app notification system fully implemented and tested. NotificationBell component in DashboardModern.js (line 299) renders in user dashboard header. Backend has 5 notification types: payment_approved, payment_rejected, referral_joined, prc_credited, subscription_expiry. Notifications stored in MongoDB 'notifications' collection with user_id field.

frontend_component.bell_icon: Shows Bell icon with gray-400 color
frontend_component.dropdown: Opens on click, shows notification list
frontend_component.mark_all_read: Button to mark all as read
frontend_component.notification_items: Shows icon, title, message, time ago

notification_types_tested: payment_approved - ✓ Shows checkmark icon in green
referral_joined - ✓ Shows user-plus icon in blue
prc_credited - ✓ Shows coins icon in purple

bug_fixed.issue: created_at was already a string in some notifications, but code was calling .isoformat() on it
bug_fixed.fix: Added check for hasattr(created_at, 'isoformat') before calling isoformat()
